# Find Swim Spots

> An imported water-location directory undergoing source and safety review.

## Current dataset

- 4,024 records contain names and coordinates.
- 48 records contain a city; 3,976 do not.
- The data contains 52 region labels.
- Every record has the same generic `Swimming` and `Public access` labels.
- The repository does not record the original source, collection date, operator, operator website, access authority, swimming permission, water quality, conditions, fees, lifeguard status, or review date.
- A coordinate is not proof of legal access, permission to swim, or safe conditions.

## Indexing and monetization

- The homepage and trust pages may be indexed.
- Browse, region, and record routes remain noindex while the imported data is rebuilt.
- Bulk imported pages are not monetization-ready.
- Advertising, analytics, affiliate links, and newsletter capture are not active.

## Publication standard

A future reviewed profile must identify the responsible operator or land manager, cite current primary sources, record what was reviewed and when, and distinguish stable sourced facts from conditions that must be checked immediately before a visit.

## Pages

- [Home](https://findswimspots.com)
- [About the rebuild](https://findswimspots.com/about)
- [Corrections and source submissions](https://findswimspots.com/contact)
- [Privacy Policy](https://findswimspots.com/privacy)
- [Terms](https://findswimspots.com/terms)
